classObjective: Graph the solution set of an absolute value equation on a number line and write absolute value equations from graphs.
workedExamples: 2-5, Example 3 — Apply Absolute Value to Real-World Problems (continued)
2-5, Example 4 — Write Absolute Value Equations from Graphs
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: number-line graphing with center and distance method; writing equations from visual graphs
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice graphing absolute value equation solutions on number lines and writing equations from graphs
independentPractice: Practice problems graphing absolute value solutions and writing equations from graphs
assessment: Exit ticket: given a number line showing two points equidistant from center, write the absolute value equation
capReflection: How does the center-distance method help you graph absolute value equations quickly?
